adverts.text: Magawa Secondary School is a government boarding secondary school located at Kamwendo in Mchinji, approximately 4 kilometers from the Mchinji Boma.  This is a co-educational school for both boys and girls. Magawa Secondary School provides quality hostels for both male and female students. As an educational institution, Magawa Secondary is dedicated to providing a holistic education to students, ensuring they become reliable citizens who contribute to national development and uphold cultural values.

The school is staffed by well-educated and professional teachers who are committed to teaching with expertise and dedication. Consequently, Form 2 and Form 4 students perform exceptionally well in their national examinations. Form 4 students are consistently selected to pursue higher education at various top universities across Malawi.
